---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a false positive, dropped signal, or unexpected behavior
labels: bug
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Command

What command were you running through cli-denoiser?

```bash
cli-denoiser <command here>
```

## Expected Output

What should have appeared in the filtered output?

## Actual Output

What actually appeared? (paste the filtered output)

## Original Output

If possible, paste the unfiltered output (run the command without cli-denoiser).

## Environment

- cli-denoiser version: (`cli-denoiser --version`)
- OS:
- Agent (Claude Code / Codex CLI / Gemini CLI / other):
